partner.hero_title: Register your venue and manage your bookings effortlessly
partner.hero_subtitle: Join a modern booking platform built to help venue owners save time, attract clients, and grow their business.
partner.benefit_1: Increase your venue's visibility to the right audience
partner.benefit_3: Receive instant notifications and email alerts
partner.benefit_4: Chat directly with clients for custom requests
partner.benefits_overview_subtitle: Powerful features designed to help you manage your venue efficiently and grow your business.
partner.benefit_card1_desc: Reach thousands of potential clients actively searching for venues like yours.
partner.benefit_card2_desc: Manage all your bookings and availability from one intuitive dashboard.
partner.benefit_card3_desc: Get instant alerts and automated reminders to never miss a booking.
partner.benefit_card4_desc: Chat with clients in real-time to discuss details and answer questions.
partner.benefits_title: Manage your venue more easily. We've got your back
partner.benefits_subtitle: Join our partner network and attract more successful events.
partner.section1_point1: Accept or decline bookings based on availability.
partner.section1_point2: Set clear rules for your venue and establish transparent conditions.
partner.section2_point1: Chat directly with clients to agree on personalized details.
partner.section2_point2: Access booking history for a complete view of your clients.
partner.section3_point1: Promote your space to thousands of active platform users.
partner.section3_point2: Get insights and statistics about your bookings and venue performance.
partner.management_subtitle: Streamline your operations with powerful tools designed for venue owners.
partner.management_feature1_desc: Quickly create, modify, and manage all your bookings with ease.
partner.management_feature2_desc: Add important notes and special instructions for each event.
partner.management_feature3_desc: Receive automated notifications and reminders for upcoming bookings.
partner.management_feature4_desc: Keep a complete record of all bookings, payments, and client interactions.
partner.rules_subtitle: Maintain complete control over your bookings and venue policies.
partner.rules_point1_desc: Review and approve bookings based on your availability and preferences.
partner.rules_point2_desc: Set transparent rules and conditions that work for your venue.
partner.rules_point3_desc: Manage what information is public and customize your venue's presence.
partner.rules_highlight1_desc: You decide which bookings to accept.
partner.rules_highlight2_desc: Set rules that match your venue's needs.
partner.rules_highlight3_desc: Control what clients see about your venue.
partner.visibility_subtitle: Showcase your space to people actively looking to book events and get performance insights.
partner.visibility_point1_desc: Your venue appears in our public directory accessible to thousands of users.
partner.visibility_point2_desc: Reach people who are actively searching for venues to book events.
partner.visibility_point3_desc: Get statistics and insights about your venue's performance and bookings.
partner.testimonials_subtitle: See what other partners are saying about our platform.
partner.testimonial1_text: This platform has transformed how we manage bookings. The automated reminders and easy interface save us hours every week.
partner.testimonial2_text: Since joining, we've seen a 40% increase in bookings. The visibility boost and direct client communication are game-changers.
partner.testimonial3_text: The flexibility to control our bookings and set our own rules makes this platform perfect for our unique venue needs.
partner.faq_subtitle: Everything you need to know about joining our platform.
partner.faq1_answer: Yes! Registration is completely free. You can list your venue and start receiving bookings at no cost. We only charge a small commission on successful bookings.
partner.faq2_answer: Our intuitive dashboard allows you to view, accept, decline, and manage all bookings in one place. You'll receive instant notifications for new booking requests and can set automated reminders.
partner.faq3_question: Can I set my own rules and policies?
partner.faq3_answer: Absolutely! You have full control over your venue's rules, policies, and booking conditions. You can customize what information is public and set clear guidelines for clients.
partner.faq4_question: How will clients find my venue?
partner.faq4_answer: Your venue will appear in our public directory, which is accessible to thousands of users actively searching for venues. You can also customize your listing to highlight your venue's unique features.
partner.faq5_question: What kind of support do you provide?
partner.faq5_answer: We provide comprehensive support including setup assistance, platform training, and ongoing customer service. Our team is here to help you succeed.
partner.final_cta_title: Ready to grow your venue's visibility?
partner.final_cta_subtitle: Join our partner network and manage your bookings with ease.
